entity.summary: Multichain automated-market-maker decentralized exchange integrated with Fluid shared liquidity, enabling spot swaps, smart collateral and smart debt liquidity designs, and deployment across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Plasma, Base, and Polygon.
entity.notes: Current first-party Fluid website and technical documentation remain reachable. Official technical docs publish Fluid DEX V2, DEX liquidity-source integration, DEX Lite integration, DEX fee, resolver, liquidity, and oracle components. DefiLlama independently reports current multichain TVL, fees, revenue, and DEX volume. HEI consolidates chain-specific and DEX Lite source rows into one Fluid DEX entity.

evidence.title: Fluid official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party Fluid domain remains reachable and serves the protocol product and statistics surfaces.

evidence.title: Fluid Technical Docs
evidence.notes: First-party technical documentation publishes Fluid DEX V2 and DEX/Dex Lite liquidity-source integrations plus DEX fee, resolver, liquidity, oracle, and contract components.

evidence.title: Fluid DEX metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry classifies Fluid DEX as an AMM and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and DEX volume across Ethereum, Plasma, Arbitrum, Base, and Polygon.
